---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
# 使用gemini 2.5 pro生成代码，首先上传图片，让其识别图片主要信息，再给出提示1：1复现该图
rm(list=ls())  # 清除环境变量  
# 设置工作路径
library(rstudioapi);setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$'path'));getwd()
# 加载包
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
# 加载数据
plot_data <- read.csv("data.csv")
# 将 major_cell_type 和 condition 转换为因子类型，以确保绘图顺序正确
plot_data$major_cell_type <- factor(plot_data$major_cell_type, 
                                    levels = c("Fibroblast", "Macrophage", "Endothelial cell", "B cell"))
plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition, 
                              levels = c("Primary tumors", "Pre-nodal metastases"))
# 保存数据，原始数据是模拟生成的，这里直接加载
# write.csv(plot_data, "data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
# 定义颜色
color_mapping <- c(
  "iCAF" = "#b8d5a3", "mCAF" = "#a2d1c6", "vCAF" = "#88abac",
  "SPP1+ Macrophage" = "#e0a35f", "FOLR2+ Macrophage" = "#f3d8b8", "IDO1+ Macrophage" = "#ba8b4a",
  "CPA3+ Macrophage" = "#d4a780", "S100A9+ Macrophage" = "#e9caa6", "CXCL9+ Macrophage" = "#a47c48",
  "Vein" = "#f3b3ae", "Artery" = "#e66a6a", "Capillary" = "#c54444", "Lymphatic" = "#a13232",
  "Naive" = "#dcd1e8", "Memory" = "#aa8ec2", "Plasma cell" = "#5c3a77"
)

# 定义形状
shape_mapping <- c(
  "iCAF" = 15, "mCAF" = 15, "vCAF" = 15, # Square
  "SPP1+ Macrophage" = 18, "FOLR2+ Macrophage" = 18, "IDO1+ Macrophage" = 18,
  "CPA3+ Macrophage" = 18, "S100A9+ Macrophage" = 18, "CXCL9+ Macrophage" = 18, # Diamond
  "Vein" = 17, "Artery" = 17, "Capillary" = 17, "Lymphatic" = 17, # Triangle
  "Naive" = 16, "Memory" = 16, "Plasma cell" = 16 # 6是Inverted Triangle，但没填充，改为圆填充16了
)
# 绘制分面配对连线图
# 两层 geom_point()，一层用来画半透明的背景“光晕”，一层画前景的实心点
main_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = condition, y = proportion, 
                                   group = cell_subtype, 
                                   color = cell_subtype, 
                                   shape = cell_subtype)) +
  # 绘制连接线
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  # 绘制半透明的背景 "光晕"
  geom_point(size = 6, alpha = 0.3) +
  # 绘制前景的实心点
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  # 按主要细胞类型分面
  facet_wrap(~major_cell_type, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  # 手动应用颜色和形状
  scale_color_manual(values = color_mapping, name = NULL) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_mapping, name = NULL) +
  # 设置Y轴标签
  ylab("Cell proportion") +
  # 美化主题
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(), # 移除x轴标题
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black",angle = 45,hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = "gray90"), # 分面标题背景
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth=1), # 添加面板边框
    legend.position = "bottom", # 图例置于底部
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  # 将图例排成两行
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE))

# 预览主图
print(main_plot)
# 顶部甜圈图
# 创建一个函数，该函数接收一个主要细胞类型和状态（condition），然后生成一个圆环图。
create_donut_chart <- function(major_type, cond, data, colors) {
  
  # 筛选数据并计算百分比
  donut_df <- data %>%
    filter(major_cell_type == major_type, condition == cond) %>%
    mutate(percentage = proportion / sum(proportion)) %>%
    arrange(desc(cell_subtype)) %>%
    mutate(lab_ypos = cumsum(percentage) - 0.5 * percentage)
  
  # 获取当前类型对应的颜色
  current_colors <- colors[names(colors) %in% donut_df$cell_subtype]
  
  ggplot(donut_df, aes(x = 2, y = percentage, fill = cell_subtype)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "white") +
    # 应用极坐标转换，变成饼图
    coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 0) + 
    # 应用颜色
    scale_fill_manual(values = current_colors) +
    # xlim设置中间的洞的大小，从而变成圆环图
    xlim(0.5, 2.5) +
    # 清理主题，使其仅保留圆环
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "none") # 移除图例
}

# 为每个分面生成一对圆环图
donuts_fib <- create_donut_chart("Fibroblast", "Primary tumors", plot_data, color_mapping) +
  create_donut_chart("Fibroblast", "Pre-nodal metastases", plot_data, color_mapping)

donuts_mac <- create_donut_chart("Macrophage", "Primary tumors", plot_data, color_mapping) +
  create_donut_chart("Macrophage", "Pre-nodal metastases", plot_data, color_mapping)

donuts_endo <- create_donut_chart("Endothelial cell", "Primary tumors", plot_data, color_mapping) +
  create_donut_chart("Endothelial cell", "Pre-nodal metastases", plot_data, color_mapping)

donuts_bcell <- create_donut_chart("B cell", "Primary tumors", plot_data, color_mapping) +
  create_donut_chart("B cell", "Pre-nodal metastases", plot_data, color_mapping)

# 将所有圆环图组合成一行
all_donuts <- (donuts_fib | donuts_mac | donuts_endo | donuts_bcell)
# 组合最终图表
# 使用 / 操作符将圆环图放在主图上方
final_plot <- all_donuts / main_plot + 
  # 设置布局，让圆环图部分高度较小
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 5))

# 显示或保存最终的图片
print(final_plot)

# 如果需要保存图片
# png("分组配对连线.png",width = 10,height = 10,unit = "in",res = 600,family = "serif")
# dev.off()

```

# Save plot
ggsave("分组配对连线.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
